headline: Vistra (VST) Prices $4 Billion Private Offering of Senior Notes to Repay Existing Debt
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is one of the best AI energy stocks to buy in 2026. On April 8, 2026, Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) announced the pricing of a $4 billion private offering of senior notes. These bonds, offered across four maturities, will extend the company’s debt ladder, allowing it to avoid having too much debt coming […]
